manifest.label: Agent Tools Export Canary
manifest.description: Export-adjacent canary demonstrating M10 agent tools that read only explicit request context (timeline, assets, export) and return exportPlanFindings plus proposal/diagnostic metadata. Represents missing contribution/export blocker context as findings or diagnostics without raw provider internals.

contributions.label: Export Plan
contributions.description: Reads explicit export context and returns export plan findings with diagnostic metadata. Never accesses raw provider internals.

contributions.label: Export Validate
contributions.description: Reads explicit export context (blockers, contributions, timeline, assets) and returns validation findings. Missing contribution/export blocker context is represented as findings and diagnostics.

messages.activation.ready: Agent Tools Export Canary ready with export plan and validate tools registered.
